trials.title: Phase II Study of Adagrasib (MRTX849) in Previously Treated KRAS G12C-Mutated NSCLC
trials.why_this_fits: This trial targets KRAS G12C mutations and enrolls previously treated patients near your location.
trials.plain_english: A once-daily pill that blocks the KRAS G12C protein driving tumor growth.
trials.eligibility_summary: Must have received prior platinum-based chemotherapy.

score_breakdown.label: Location
score_breakdown.reason: Primary site is near your location

trials.title: Sotorasib Plus Pembrolizumab in KRAS G12C-Mutant NSCLC
trials.why_this_fits: Combines a KRAS G12C inhibitor with immunotherapy for patients who have progressed on prior therapy.
trials.plain_english: Tests whether adding an immunotherapy drug boosts the effect of the KRAS pill.
warning_flags: Combination therapy — more monitoring visits than single-agent trials.

excluded_trials.title: Phase III First-Line Chemo-Immunotherapy Study
excluded_trials.reason: Enrolls only treatment-naive patients, but you have prior therapy.

search_context: Found open KRAS G12C trials (mock fixture — set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for live ranking).
condition_searched: stage 3 non-small cell lung cancer KRAS G12C
